Adapting.relationship_description: The part-of-speech tagset refers to the specific tagging system known as stts, which is used for annotating parts of speech in text.

part-of-speech tagset.relationship_description: The action of adapting is relevant to non-standard text as it involves modifying the tagset to fit the unique characteristics of such text.

non-standard text.entity_description: Text that does not conform to conventional language rules or formats, often including informal or colloquial language.

stts.entity_description: The Stuttgart-Tübingen Tagset, a specific part-of-speech tagset used for annotating German text.
